step.name: compute-5-stage-snapshot
step.action: Compute metric + value + baseline_30d + delta_pct for each of 5 stages.

step.name: identify-bottleneck
step.action: Top-down scan: the first stage with unexplained drop >30% (or smallest absolute conversion) is the bottleneck.

step.name: queue-tactics-for-bottleneck
step.action: Sample 3-5 tactics tagged for the bottleneck stage. Score with ICE elsewhere.

step.name: publish-weekly-report
step.action: Publish all 5 stages even if only 1 changing.

step.name: review-with-owners
step.action: Owner signs off on bottleneck + tactic queue.
